diagrams.title: Vanishing Gradient in Deep Network
diagrams.description: Shows how gradient magnitude decreases exponentially through layers during backpropagation
diagrams.purpose: Understanding why early layers train slowly in deep networks

diagrams.title: Skip Connection Architecture
diagrams.description: Residual block with skip connection showing F(x) + x pathway
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how skip connections create gradient highways

diagrams.title: Batch Normalization Process
diagrams.description: Flow diagram showing normalization, scaling, and shifting of activations
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how BatchNorm transforms layer inputs

diagrams.title: Initialization Comparison
diagrams.description: Shows activation distribution with different initialization methods
